name: v1.19.20
body:
## What's Changed
* 828fd30d chore: support connection reuse for DoT by @H1JK
* 3c526ae0 feat: add `query-server-name` for `ech-opts` by @wwqgtxx
* dede56fe feat: add `proxy-server-nameserver-policy` to `dns` section by @wwqgtxx
* e45c8961 feat: support masque outbound by @wwqgtxx
* f94da9f2 chore: fingerprint verifier handle non-leaf certificate will check the SNI matches the certificate's DNS name by @wwqgtxx

## BUG & Fix
* 2cfc4ba0 fix: CVE-2025-68121 for crypto/tls again and again by @wwqgtxx
* 32799662 fix: quic data race for crypto/tls by @wwqgtxx
* 3ac62152 fix: race condition of tcpConcurrent in dialer (#2556) by @Chenx Dust
* 75a0cd5a fix: file exists when tun start by @wwqgtxx
* 85c024a4 fix: snat key in sudoku packet listener by @wwqgtxx
* d18a14af fix: snat key in trojan packet listener by @wwqgtxx
* e3b8fc2b fix: hy2 listener panic with http/https masquerade by @wwqgtxx
* f52c9356 fix: CVE-2025-68121 for crypto/tls again by @wwqgtxx

## Maintenance
* 022f6773 chore: cleanup hostValue code by @wwqgtxx
* 034f1d1e chore: disallow empty `proxy-server-nameserver` when `proxy-server-nameserver-policy` is set by @wwqgtxx
* 0c995a24 chore: move proxiesWithProviders to hub/route internal to disallow external usage of this poorly implemented function by @wwqgtxx
* 18d139a1 chore: rollback tls to restore the session resumption functionality in quic-go by @wwqgtxx
* 1e1434d1 chore: remove an unnecessary variable by @wwqgtxx
* 26052ba5 chore: remove confused varbin using in sing by @wwqgtxx
* 27a3ca6a chore: converter support fingerprint for vmess/vless/trojan by @wwqgtxx
* 3bca69c7 chore: add some comments for the fingerprint verifier by @wwqgtxx
* 46ee1649 chore: hy2 listener fellow hysteria2's code skip verify in https masquerade by @wwqgtxx
* 5516ca18 chore: code cleanup by @wwqgtxx
* 5e1b133e chore: more callback support for utls by @wwqgtxx
* 5fda87d5 chore: update sing-tun by @wwqgtxx
* 65c3d3e4 chore: remove unreachable code in sudoku by @wwqgtxx
* 6aaabc97 chore: decrease unneeded string convert in socks5 addr parsing by @wwqgtxx
* 707fe8b2 chore: remove auto IDNA conversion in domain rules by @wwqgtxx
* 710772f9 chore: add simple validation for static dialer-proxy config (#2551) by @sleshep
* 7573affd chore: better logging in masque outbound by @wwqgtxx
* 86257fc8 chore: remove reflect-based provider override code by @wwqgtxx
* 8b0bcb67 chore: better generator by @wwqgtxx
* 97f25250 chore: code cleanup by @wwqgtxx
* 98b30605 chore: optimize timeout control in DoH TLS probe by @wwqgtxx
* 993595df chore: switch to our own common/orderedmap package, remove two unneeded json dependence by @wwqgtxx
* b9010064 chore: using mihomo's global pool in DoQ by @wwqgtxx
* c33c90d7 chore: clean up duplicate code in sudoku by @wwqgtxx
* d36b024b chore: align sudoku with upstream v0.2.0 (#2549) by @saba-futai
* e03ba23f chore: update logrus by @wwqgtxx
* f2222b5e chore: code cleanup by @wwqgtxx

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MetaCubeX/mihomo/compare/v1.19.19...v1.19.20
